risk_if_not_implemented: Without Dynamic Code Analysis, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Testing Throughout Development
compensating_control_1.description:
Mechanisms exist to require system developers/integrators consult with security, compliance and/or resilience personnel to: 
(1) Create and implement a Security Testing and Evaluation (ST&E) plan, or similar capability;
(2) Implement a verifiable flaw remediation process to correct weaknesses and deficiencies identified during the control testing and evaluation process; and
(3) Document the results.
compensating_control_1.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Testing Throughout Development (TDA-09) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of Dynamic Code Analysis (TDA-09.3) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to regularly review processes and documented procedures to ensure conformity with the organization's security, compliance and/or resilience policies, standards and other applicable requirements.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments (CPL-03) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of Dynamic Code Analysis (TDA-09.3) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
